stack.frontend: Next.js 16 (App Router, React 19, Tailwind v4) — planned
stack.backend: Next.js API routes + optional Render-hosted services — planned

current_state_2026_06_12.memory_mcp_wiring: via .mcp.json (will land when site code starts)
current_state_2026_06_12.pillar_2_page: deferred to Phase 6 per the ratified upskilling sequence

active_dev_focus: Project is seeded but the Next.js app + site content have not been built yet. The Pillar 2 upskilling page is the natural first feature once the-loom's Phases 0-5 (Stop-hook upskilling enforcement, candidate registry, local observer, cross-project detection, Make_Skills bridge_receiver implementation, Policy Service) ship.
role_in_loom_set: Public-facing site for the loom platform. Demonstrates the architecture by being a consumer of it (reads from the-loom MCP for cross-project state; integrates with Make_Skills engine endpoints when those come online; runs its own .project-intelligence/ instance just like every other consumer).
